creator: jp_ambriz@hotmail.com
text:
Setting a breakpoint or an instruction that should start the debugger results in the following messages.

--- Debugging process stopped ---

handle_crash: Program crashed with signal 4
Engine version: Godot Engine v4.2.1.stable.FreeBSD_Ports_build
Dumping the backtrace. Please include this when reporting the bug to the project developer.
[1] 0x82bec6410 <pthread_sigmask+0x540> at /lib/libthr.so.3 (??:0)
[2] 0x82bec59cb <pthread_setschedparam+0x84b> at /lib/libthr.so.3 (??:0)
[3] 0x8268472d3 <???> at ??? (??:0)
-- END OF BACKTRACE --
